creator: watanabe@edu5.phys.nagoya-u.ac.jp
text:
I made a new port 'ja-dvipsk-5.66a'.
This is a DVI to PostScript translator with Japanese patch.

I put the port packed with 'tar czf' and uuencode below "Fix:"

Packed tarball is

   2793 Nov  4 11:54 ja-dvipsk-5.66a-971104.tar.gz

Packed list is

      0 Nov  4 11:53 1997 dvipsk/

      0 Oct 21 23:35 1997 dvipsk/patches/
    598 Oct 21 23:42 1997 dvipsk/patches/patch-aa
    462 Oct 21 23:46 1997 dvipsk/patches/patch-ab
      0 Oct 21 23:59 1997 dvipsk/pkg/
